calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TRANSFER to SAN DIEGO County
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emily Wirowek, Esq., counsel for Elizabeth Hope, Petitioner (appearing by video conference).

The Court notes at the outset that the Probate Code provides for a transfer of a will to another county only when there is an open proceeding in that county, further noting there does not appear to be a proceeding pending in San Diego County. Ms. Wirawek confirms the same and describes the circumstances that occasion the request (primarily a creditor dispute with the decedent's trust).

After discussion, the Court denies the petition without prejudice.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Deputy: K. Kabasares; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2020 Continued To Nov-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
